name: Southwest Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 medium white grapefruit, peeled and segmented
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the chicken breast with oil.
2. Sprinkle chili powder evenly onto both sides of the chicken.
3. Grill the chicken for 5 minutes on each side over medium-hot coals, or until it is no longer pink in the center. Alternatively, sauté the chicken in 1 tablespoon hot oil in a large skillet over medium heat for about 5 minutes on each side, until it is no longer pink.
4. Meanwhile, divide lettuce and grapefruit segments onto plates.
5. Cut each chicken breast diagonally into slices.
6. Assemble the salads by placing the chicken slices atop the greens mixture on each plate.
7. Spoon some Citrus-Pineapple Salsa over the salads. Pass remaining salsa for serving.
Makes 4 servings.
